sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Index
sources.scope: Game data, assets, maps, NPCs, items, events, locations, and modding references linked from the index.

sources.title: Content Patcher documentation
sources.scope: Content pack format, patch actions, tokens, conditions, token strings, includes, i18n, and authoring behavior.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Dialogue
sources.scope: Dialogue asset targets, dialogue key patterns, formatting commands, portrait commands, and dialogue-triggered actions.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Items
sources.scope: Item type identifiers, item data targets, object fields, crop/item examples, and gift taste edit patterns.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Event data
sources.scope: Event key format, event script structure, event commands, directions, comments, and multiline scripts.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:NPC data
sources.scope: Data/Characters fields, NPC spawn/home/appearance data, social fields, and Winter Star gifts.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Gift taste data
sources.scope: Data/NPCGiftTastes format, universal and personal taste keys, taste ordering, and TextOperations-friendly edits.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Schedule data
sources.scope: NPC schedule keys, schedule script point format, initial commands, and schedule dialogue references.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Mail data
sources.scope: Data/Mail keys, message formatting, item/recipe/action attachments, and mail titles.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Trigger actions
sources.scope: Data/TriggerActions fields, triggers, action invocation from dialogue/events/mail, and repeat behavior.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Common data field types
sources.scope: Common field types including unique IDs, asset names, colors, item IDs, item queries, translation keys, points, rectangles, and modifiers.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Location data
sources.scope: Data/Locations fields, location creation, artifact spots, fish, forage, music, and advanced fields.

sources.title: Stardew Valley Wiki - Modding:Shops
sources.scope: Data/Shops shop model fields, stock item fields, vanilla shop IDs, currencies, stock limits, and condition usage.

sources.title: Content Patcher author guide
sources.scope: Top-level Content Patcher authoring behavior and links to detailed author-guide pages.

sources.title: Content Patcher tokens
sources.scope: Token syntax, token categories, and value substitution behavior.

sources.title: Content Patcher translations
sources.scope: i18n folder behavior, default fallback, i18n token arguments, and dynamic translation patterns.

sources.title: Content Patcher trigger actions
sources.scope: Content Patcher guidance for trigger action usage.

sources.title: Content Patcher text operations
sources.scope: TextOperations for EditData/EditMap including Append, Prepend, RemoveDelimited, and ReplaceDelimited.

update_policy.notes: The app ships with a curated offline snapshot. Future updates can import replacement rule packs derived from the same sources.
